descriptors.name: grain size
descriptors.physical_meaning: characteristic length scale of crystalline domains
descriptors.rationale: fundamental microstructure descriptor controlling mechanical properties

quality.loss_reason: collapses full size distribution to single value
quality.notes: loses shape and multimodality of distribution

descriptors.name: twin boundary fraction
descriptors.physical_meaning: proportion of low-energy coherent twin interfaces
descriptors.rationale: special boundaries affect mechanical and corrosion resistance

quality.loss_reason: loses spatial distribution of twin boundaries
quality.notes: preserves fraction but not topology or location

descriptors.name: stored energy
descriptors.physical_meaning: elastic energy from defects and interfaces
descriptors.rationale: driving force for recrystallization and recovery

quality.loss_reason: integrates spatial energy distribution to single value
quality.notes: loses spatial heterogeneity and defect type information

descriptors.name: subgrain size
descriptors.physical_meaning: scale of low-angle dislocation cell structure
descriptors.rationale: indicates deformation history and recovery state

quality.loss_reason: reduces distribution to mean, loses variance
quality.notes: ignores subgrain morphology and misorientation distribution

descriptors.name: kernel average misorientation
descriptors.physical_meaning: local orientation gradient indicating plastic strain
descriptors.rationale: quantifies crystal lattice curvature from dislocations

quality.loss_reason: spatial averaging destroys local heterogeneity information
quality.notes: loses spatial maps and statistical distribution

descriptors.name: grain boundary character distribution
descriptors.physical_meaning: crystallographic parameters of all grain interfaces
descriptors.rationale: complete statistical description of boundary ensemble

quality.notes: loses individual boundary identity and topology

representation.notes: maximum ODF value, unity for random

quality.loss_reason: collapses entire ODF to single peak value
quality.notes: loses texture components, symmetry, and distribution shape

descriptors.name: dislocation density
descriptors.physical_meaning: line length of dislocations per unit volume
descriptors.rationale: controls strength via Taylor hardening relation

quality.loss_reason: loses dislocation type, arrangement, and spatial distribution
quality.notes: ignores character, slip system, and substructure

descriptors.name: grain aspect ratio
descriptors.rationale: indicates processing history and mechanical anisotropy

representation.notes: greater than unity for elongated grains

quality.notes: loses orientation, distribution, and full shape information

descriptors.name: grain boundary energy
descriptors.physical_meaning: excess free energy at crystalline interfaces
descriptors.rationale: determines boundary mobility and thermodynamic stability

descriptors.name: recrystallized fraction
descriptors.physical_meaning: volume proportion of strain-free recrystallized grains

quality.loss_reason: loses spatial distribution and nucleation sites
quality.notes: sensitive to recrystallization definition and measurement method

descriptors.name: Schmid factor
descriptors.physical_meaning: resolved shear stress for slip activation
descriptors.rationale: predicts slip system activation and yield anisotropy

quality.loss_reason: averages over orientations and slip systems
quality.notes: loses texture, individual orientations, and system specificity

descriptors.name: grain boundary mobility
descriptors.rationale: controls kinetics of grain growth and recrystallization

quality.notes: loses boundary character dependence and distribution

descriptors.name: misorientation angle distribution
descriptors.physical_meaning: statistical distribution of grain boundary misorientations

quality.loss_reason: loses axis information and spatial correlations
quality.notes: reduces 3D rotation space to scalar angle

descriptors.name: grain topology
descriptors.physical_meaning: average number of neighboring grains per grain

quality.loss_reason: reduces network topology to single average value
quality.notes: loses distribution, spatial arrangement, and graph structure

descriptors.name: geometrically necessary dislocation density
descriptors.physical_meaning: dislocations required to accommodate orientation gradients
descriptors.rationale: lower bound indicating plastic deformation heterogeneity

representation.notes: lower bound on total dislocation density

quality.loss_reason: spatial averaging and loss of dislocation type
quality.truncation_error: step size and orientation resolution dependent
quality.notes: underestimates total density, loses spatial distribution
